issues.description: Some vocabulary terms like 'suprachiasmatic nucleus' and 'glymphatic system' may be challenging for 6th graders without additional context or pronunciation guides
The passage contains dense scientific content that approaches the upper limit of grade 6 complexity, though still appropriate
Discussion questions could benefit from more explicit scaffolding to guide students between citing evidence and making inferences

strengths: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 standard requiring students to cite evidence and make inferences
Well-structured template with clear objectives, vocabulary support, and comprehensive content
Age-appropriate topic that directly relates to students' lives and experiences
Strong balance of explicit information and opportunities for inference-making
Scientifically accurate content presented at appropriate complexity level
Discussion questions effectively target both explicit evidence citation and inference skills
Neutral worldview maintained throughout with factual, research-based content
Good progression from vocabulary introduction to passage reading to skill application
overall_assessment: This is a high-quality educational resource that effectively supports 6th grade reading comprehension skills. The content is engaging, scientifically sound, and well-aligned with curriculum standards. Minor vocabulary complexity concerns are offset by the relevance and importance of the topic for student audiences.
